session.user: Run `make lint` in /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report all results - pass or fail with full error messages.
session.assistant: I'll run `make lint` and report all results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run make lint to check code quality

session.tool_result: uv run ruff check All checks passed!
session.assistant:
**make lint passed**
The linting check completed successfully with no violations found. The `make lint` command ran `uv run ruff check`, which verified the code and returned:
``` All checks passed! ```
This means there are no linting issues in the codebase.
